description: Renders a horizontal stack of overlapping avatars with an optional overflow indicator showing the count of hidden items (e.g., "+3"). Pass TmAvatar elements as child content.

parameters.name: Max
parameters.description: Maximum number of avatars to show before showing overflow count.

parameters.name: TotalCount
parameters.description: Total number of items in the full collection (used to calculate overflow).

parameters.name: Size
parameters.description: Size applied to overflow avatar bubble and group spacing. Defaults to Md.

examples.title: Avatar group with overflow
examples.code:
<TmAvatarGroup Max="3" TotalCount="7" Size="AvatarSize.Sm">
    <TmAvatar Src="/img/user1.jpg" Name="Alice" Size="AvatarSize.Sm" />
    <TmAvatar Src="/img/user2.jpg" Name="Bob" Size="AvatarSize.Sm" />
    <TmAvatar Name="Charlie" Size="AvatarSize.Sm" />
</TmAvatarGroup>
